positive: Minimalist black line art illustration of a howling wolf and crescent moon embracing, designed as a stylized circular emblem. The wolf should have sleek, dynamic lines, and the moon should feature delicate cosmic patterns. Use negative space effectively to create a sense of mystery and celestial harmony. Strong contrast between the pure black lines and the white background. Highly detailed, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Nordic mystic aesthetic, clean silhouette, symmetrical composition, graphic novel style, ink drawing, crisp lines, high detail, tattoo flash style.
